moderation_image_jpeg_quality.description: Calidad JPEG para moderacion con IA (rango valido: 20-100). Controla compresion de imagen enviada a Cloud Functions.

date_suggestions_enabled.description: [DEPRECATED — usar places_search_config.enabled] Habilitar o deshabilitar el sistema de sugerencias de lugares para citas

places_search_config.description: Configuración dinámica de búsqueda de lugares para citas (ChatView). Progressive radius strategy (homologado con Coach IA): progressiveRadiusSteps (búsqueda inicial), minPlacesTarget, minRadius, maxRadius, loadMoreDefaultBaseRadius/ExpansionBase/MaxExpansionStep (loadMore exponencial). radiusSteps: radios para pageToken path (backward compat). perQueryResults: resultados por query Google Places. maxPlacesIntermediate: cap de places únicos. queriesWithCategory/WithoutCategory: queries paralelas. useRestriction: hard/soft geo filter. photoMaxHeightPx: altura fotos. photosPerPlace: max fotos por lugar. travelSpeedKmH: velocidad estimada viaje. maxLoadCount: clamp loadCount. defaultLanguage: idioma fallback. defaultCategoryQueryCount: queries con categoría. categoryQueryMap: (opcional) objeto {category: queryTerms} para override dinámico — si null usa fallback hardcodeado con 14 categorías bilingües.

compatibility_weights.description: Pesos para el algoritmo de compatibilidad. La suma debe ser 1.0

date_suggestions_max_distance_km.description: Distancia máxima en kilómetros para buscar lugares para citas (80 km = 49.7 millas)

moderation_config.description: Dynamic configuration for Moderation RAG (server-side only). Controls RAG pipeline parameters for moderateMessage and autoModerateMessage. Kill switch: rag.enabled=false. Tunable without redeployment.

moderation_image_max_dimension.description: Dimension maxima de imagen para moderacion con IA (rango valido: 256-1024). Reduce payload enviado a Cloud Functions.

terms_url.description: URL for Terms and Conditions page

offense_system_config.description: Configuración completa del sistema de penalización por comportamiento ofensivo

reviewer_uid.description: UID del reviewer exento de protección de pantalla. Configurable sin redeploy.

reviewer_test_phone.description: Número de teléfono de prueba para revisores Apple/Google. Rango 555-01XX reservado para ficción.

debug_allowed_emails.description: white list user email receive notificacion debug mode android

reviewer_test_code.description: Código de verificación para el test phone del reviewer Apple/Google

defaultValue.value: {"enabled":true,"maxMessageLength":2000,"historyLimit":10,"maxActivities":30,"maxSuggestions":3,"maxReplyLength":5000,"rateLimitPerHour":30,"temperature":0.9,"maxTokens":2048,"learningEnabled":true,"personalityTone":"warm, supportive, encouraging but honest","blockedTopics":["politics","religion","coding","programming","math","science homework","medical advice","legal advice","financial advice","gambling","drugs","weapons","hacking","cheating strategies","manipulation tactics","revenge","stalking","explicit sexual content","pornography","self-harm","terrorism","illegal activities"],"additionalGuidelines":"","dailyCredits":5,"placeSearch":{"enableWithoutLocation":true,"minActivitiesForPlaceSearch":6,"defaultRadius":100000,"minRadius":3000,"maxRadius":300000,"radiusSteps":[100000,130000,180000,250000,300000],"progressiveRadiusSteps":[15000,30000,60000,120000,200000,300000],"minPlacesTarget":30,"loadMoreDefaultBaseRadius":60000,"loadMoreExpansionBase":2,"loadMoreMaxExpansionStep":4,"perQueryResults":20,"maxPlacesIntermediate":60,"maxOutputTokensBudget":8192},"rag":{"enabled":true,"topK":5,"minScore":0.25,"fetchMultiplier":3,"collection":"coachKnowledge","promptHeader":"SUGAR DATING EXPERT KNOWLEDGE BASE (use this curated sugar dating and relationship advice to personalize your response — reference specific tips about sugar dynamics, arrangements, boundaries, safety, and etiquette when relevant):"}}

coach_config.description: Dynamic configuration for AI Date Coach (server-side only). Controls behavior, limits, guardrails, content policies, and learning system without redeployment.

coach_max_input_length.description: Max input length for Coach Chat (range 100-10000). Read by Android RemoteConfigManager + iOS RemoteConfigService.

coach_daily_credits.description: Daily coach credits (range 1-100). CF resetCoachMessages reads from coach_config.dailyCredits. This key is for client-side UI threshold.
